title: Shane Andrews | Senior Associate | BAL Immigration Law
content:
## Senior Associate // Dallas
Shane is a Senior Associate in BAL’s Dallas office, where he leads a team of experienced immigration paralegals and provides strategic guidance to corporate clients across diverse industries. With over 12 years of experience in U.S. immigration law, Shane advises organizations of all sizes on complex corporate immigration matters, including program management, the impact of corporate restructuring and mergers and acquisitions. His deep expertise includes U.S. temporary work and investment visas, permanent residency (green cards) and naturalization. In addition to his corporate practice, Shane counsels individuals on family-based immigration solutions. Recognized by Best Lawyers: Ones to Watch in America, Shane is committed to delivering innovative, client-focused immigration strategies that drive business success and support individual aspirations.
Southern Methodist University Dedman School of Law, J.D., magna cum laude Southern Methodist University, B.A., English
